privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a clinical template titled 'Normal Physical Exam'. The template must include the HEENT text 'Normocephalic, atraumatic, PERRLA' and the cardiovascular text 'no murmurs, rubs, or gallops'. This is confirmed by the task description and verification scripts.
